work_unit: 根治 standing optimization worktree 自指循环——cmd_merge 成功后不删 auto/optimization 分支 ref
situation: scout-scan 2026-06-30T01:29:32Z 推 AS #2『review 1 个待合并 worktree』。查 AS standing optimization worktree(auto/optimization @883cfbf) cherry 对账：case-313/314/315/317/318 经 merge commit 已在 main(cat-file 证 PRESENT)，仅 case-321.json 真未合(ABSENT from main)；cherry 对 5886519/649ca3c 显 `+` 系假阳性(内容经 squash-merge 入 main 而 opt 侧单提交本身未 cherry-pick)。case-321 自陈属 [[autonomous-engine-self-selection-fix]] 类自指循环：每轮重审同 standing worktree、写新 case 称已合、case 文件本身滞留 worktree 成下轮唯一未合内容。根因定位到 scripts/opt-worktree.sh cmd_merge(行229-260)：squash+`worktree remove` 后**不删 auto/<wt> 分支 ref**(cmd_reject 行268 才 branch -D)，致下轮 cmd_init 的 `worktree add -b auto/optimization`(行54)因 ref 已在而失败、fallback `worktree add "$dir" auto/optimization`(行55)检出陈旧 tip，新提交堆旧 tip 上 → cherry 永显伪 +/两点 diff 永显伪删/循环。即记忆 [[opt-worktree-merge-leaves-branch-ref]] 记录的待根治缺口。
action: 最小改动(1 文件 1 处)：cmd_merge 成功分支内 `worktree 清理` echo 后加 `git -C "$PROJECT" branch -D "auto/$(basename "$dir")" 2>/dev/null || true`(同 cmd_reject 行268) + 4 行注释说明根因/gate 豁免。两副本同改防漂移([[opt-worktree-root-as-copy-drift]])：root live(/home/admin/workspace/scripts/opt-worktree.sh,非 git 实跑) + AS git(autonomous-studio/scripts/opt-worktree.sh,跟踪)——md5 同施前后均逐字节一致(9ad95d69...)。gate 安全核验：autonomous-commit-gate.py 行160-163 branch 子命令仅拦 `-D main/master`(MAIN_BRANCHES={main,master})，auto/* 放行；cmd_reject 已长期用同句无事(precedent)。验证流程：(1)用已修复 root live 提交 AS git 副本进 standing worktree→tip 1998d34(883cfbf+fix)；(2)merge optimization→squash 合 case-321+fix 入 main；(3)新 branch -D 行触发清 auto/optimization ref。
